extDescription.message: YouTube without the noise. Hide feed, Shorts, comments, recs. Focus modes, daily limits, Pomodoro, mindful pause. Free.

modeOffDesc.message: ZenTube is disabled. YouTube behaves normally.

modeCasualDesc.message: Hides Shorts and end-screen suggestions. Comments and home feed stay visible.

modeLearningDesc.message: Hides home feed, recommendations, Shorts, trending, and view counts. Comments stay.

modeDeepDesc.message: Hides everything except the current video. Grayscale on. Maximum focus.

modeLearningShort.message: Hide feed + recs + counts. Keep comments.

pomoBreakBody.message: Step away from the screen. Stretch. Breathe. Get water.

focusPageSub.message: Pick a preset or customize exactly what disappears from YouTube.

customCalloutText.message: Custom mode active. Your individual toggles below override the preset.

timePageSub.message: Set a daily limit and YouTube will close itself when you hit it.

timeLimitSub.message: Block YouTube when you exceed this many minutes per day.

autoplaySub.message: Stops YouTube from auto-playing the next video.

autopauseSub.message: Pauses the video when you switch tabs.

blockShortsSub.message: Opening a /shorts/ URL redirects to the normal /watch view.

scheduleSub.message: Block YouTube during specific hours and days. Great for work blocks.

scheduleEmpty.message: No rules yet. Add one below.

channelsPageSub.message: Allow only specific channels, or block ones that suck your time.

whitelistModeSub.message: If on, only channels in your whitelist are accessible.

allowedChannelsSub.message: Comma-separated channel names exactly as they appear on YouTube.

blockedChannelsSub.message: Comma-separated. Pages from these channels will be blocked.

mindfulPageSub.message: Add friction so you watch YouTube intentionally, not by reflex.

mindfulPauseSub.message: Before YouTube loads, ask 'why are you here?' with a forced delay.

customHomeSub.message: Replace the YouTube home feed with a clock, greeting and your own quote.

customHomePlaceholder.message: Leave blank for rotating Zen quotes.

widgetSub.message: A small badge in the corner showing time today and your mode.

pomodoroSub.message: Watch for 25 minutes, then take a forced 5-minute break. Long break every 4 cycles.

pomodoroHint.message: Start the timer from the popup. During breaks, video pauses and YouTube is blocked.

statsPageSub.message: See your real YouTube relationship — measured, not guessed.

recentIntentionsSub.message: What you've typed into the mindful pause.

noIntents.message: No intentions logged yet. Enable mindful pause to start.

resetConfirm.message: Reset all stats? This cannot be undone.

advancedPageSub.message: Keyboard shortcuts, sync, and data tools.

shortcutQuickDeep.message: Quick toggle Deep mode (on a YouTube tab)

shortcutJumpSearch.message: From custom homepage, jump to search

exportImportSub.message: Save your config as JSON, or load one.

supportLead.message: ZenTube is free and always will be. If it helped you take back your time, consider a tip — it pays for hosting and keeps the project going.

kofiP.message: One-time tip via Ko-fi. No fees on one-time donations. Takes 20 seconds.

sponsorP.message: Support development on GitHub Sponsors. Cancel anytime. 100% goes to the project.

supportThanks.message: Even just sharing ZenTube with a friend helps a lot. Thank you for using it. 🙏

aboutP.message: Free, open-source, no account required. No tracking. Your data stays on your device.
